title: Qeyroc #7026
definition:
Keros = "ankle"

 1) head of a family of temple slaves who returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Keros = "ankle"

 1) head of a family of temple slaves who returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel

    NASB:  father of some postexilic temple servants
